sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Good - clicking the white dot at (11, 21) added 1 purple pixel to the bottom bar. Now I have 1 purple pixel there. The pattern at row 11 is YWY under each purple block (3 blocks, each with YWY pattern).
Let me think about what the goal might be:
- The bottom bar tracks progress with purple pixels
- Clicking dots under purple blocks adds purple pixels
- There are 3 purple blocks, each with YWY pattern (3 dots each = 9 dots total)
- There are 14 green blocks
My hypothesis: I need to click all the dots under purple blocks to "unlock" something, then collect green blocks. Or maybe the bottom bar needs to fill up to a certain point before green blocks can be collected without game over.
Let me try clicking all 9 dots (YWY pattern under each of 3 purple blocks) to fill the bottom bar, then see if green blocks can be collected differently.
The dots are at row 11:
- Block 1: cols 14-16 (purple), dots at cols 14(Y), 15(W), 16(Y) → but wait, the ascii shows "Y W Y" at positions
- Let me re-read: Row 11: BYWYBSBYWYBSBYWY
  - B at col 13, then Y at 14, W at 15, Y at 16, B at 17, S at 18, B at 19, Y at 20, W at 21, Y at 22, B at 23, S at 24, B at 25, Y at 26, W at 27, Y at 28
So dots are at:
- Block 1: (11,14)=Y, (11,15)=W, (11,16)=Y
- Block 2: (11,20)=Y, (11,21)=W, (11,22)=Y
- Block 3: (11,26)=Y, (11,27)=W, (11,28)=Y
I already clicked (11,21) which was W. Let me click the remaining 8 dots. But I need to be careful about game over - clicking dots also counts as MOUSE clicks.
Wait - but clicking dots adds purple pixels to the bottom bar. Maybe the game over is related to how many purple pixels are on the bar? Let me test by clicking a few more dots and seeing if game over still happens at ~8-9 total clicks.
Actually, let me reconsider. The game over happened after ~8-9 MOUSE clicks total. If I click 9 dots, that's 9 clicks and might trigger game over. But maybe clicking dots doesn't trigger game over the same way?
Let me try clicking just one more dot to see if it also adds a purple pixel and doesn't trigger game over.
